scenario.key_phrase: I'm just looking at options for now

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning, main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Am I speaking with Kavya?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this is Kavya... but I'm just looking at options for now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul, no pressure at all! Main bas samjhana chahti hun ki aap kis class mein ho and what are you preparing for? Just to understand your requirements better.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in 10th standard right now... thinking about JEE preparation.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing! JEE preparation ke liye 10th se start karna is really smart. So you're targeting JEE Main 2027, right? That gives you good 2+ years to prepare properly.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan... but I'm not sure about online coaching yet. And fees bhi concern hai.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I completely understand, Kavya. Budget is important for every family. Our JEE Arjuna 2027 batch is specially designed for students like you - it's just ₹19,999 for the complete course. We also have EMI options starting at ₹1,999 per month through PW Pay.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹1,999 per month... that's still quite a lot. What exactly do we get in this course?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! You get complete JEE syllabus coverage, live classes, recorded lectures, doubt solving sessions, regular tests, and study material - everything you need for JEE prep. Think about it - ₹1,999 is less than what most families spend on tuition per subject locally. Yahan complete package mil raha hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm... sounds okay but I'll need to discuss with my parents first. Can you call back later?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Family discussion is very important for such decisions. When would be a good time to call back? And should I speak with you or would your parents also like to join the call?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe call tomorrow evening around 6 PM? And yes, my dad would want to know the details too.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect, Kavya! I'll call you tomorrow at 6 PM and can explain everything to your dad as well. Meanwhile, I'll share some course details on WhatsApp. Just think about your goals - JEE 2027 mein acha rank lane ke liye consistent preparation chahiye. We'll help you achieve that!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay, that works. Thank you for the information, Priya.
